creator: rflynn@acsalaska.net
text:
On 25-5-2012 16:01, scheidell@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> Synopsis: [NEW PORT] net/nss-pam-ldapd-sasl: Advanced fork of nss_ldap with sasl support
> 
> State-Changed-From-To: suspended->closed
> State-Changed-By: scheidell
> State-Changed-When: Fri May 25 14:01:08 UTC 2012
> State-Changed-Why: 
> Submitter to supply a replacment patch in a new pr. (new pr is better!)
> 
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=166811
> 

Except that there is no replacement patch. I've made all the fixes in
the master and the patch for the slave won't change, unless you want me
to download it again from this PR and make a new PR, it seems more
logical to keep this suspended.

The new PR for the master port is forthcoming.
-- 
Mel
